summary: Comprehensive testing of new CRM features completed. Backend: 100% pass (15/15 tests). Frontend: All critical flows verified including Store CRM dashboard, enhanced Refill Due columns, staff assignment on customer profiles, and STORE_MANAGER role in User Management.

issues: Minor accessibility warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent (non-blocking)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials (admin@sahakar.com / admin123) returns token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with CRM credentials (crm@sahakar.com / crm123) returns token
Backend: GET /api/crm/store-crm-dashboard returns kpis, new_customers, rc_purchases, upcoming_purchases
Backend: GET /api/crm/store-crm-dashboard accepts date_from and date_to filters
Backend: GET /api/crm/store-staff returns staff list structure
Backend: GET /api/crm/store-staff accepts store_id filter
Backend: GET /api/crm/staff-performance returns staff performance metrics with period_days
Backend: GET /api/crm/staff-performance accepts custom days parameter
Backend: GET /api/crm/refill-due-enhanced returns items with in_stock, required, assigned_staff fields
Backend: GET /api/crm/refill-due-enhanced accepts category filters (overdue, today, 3days, 7days)
Backend: PUT /api/crm/customers/{id}/assign-staff requires authentication
Backend: PUT /api/crm/customers/{id}/assign-staff accessible by ADMIN role
Backend: GET /api/crm/customers/{id} returns assigned_staff_id and assigned_staff_name
Backend: POST /api/users can create users with STORE_MANAGER role
Frontend: Admin login redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Store CRM nav item visible in sidebar for ADMIN role
Frontend: /crm/store-crm page loads with Store CRM Dashboard
Frontend: Store CRM shows 6 KPI cards (Customers, RC Customers, Overdue, Due Today, Due 7 Days, New in Range)
Frontend: Store CRM has 4 tabs (Upcoming Refills, RC Purchases, New Customers, Staff Performance)
Frontend: /crm/refill-due page shows enhanced columns (In Stock, Required, Assigned)
Frontend: /users page has STORE_MANAGER role option in dropdown
Frontend: Customer profile shows 'Convert to RC' button for walkin customers
Frontend: RC customer profile shows Assigned Staff section with staff dropdown
Frontend: Staff assignment dropdown shows TEST Store Manager (STORE_MANAGER)

seed_data_verified.test_store_manager: TEST Store Manager - STORE_MANAGER role user

context_for_next_testing_agent: New CRM features all working: Store CRM dashboard at /crm/store-crm, enhanced refill-due with in_stock/required/assigned columns, staff assignment on RC customer profiles, STORE_MANAGER role in user management. Database has 1 customer (TEST_StaffAssignCustomer) now RC type and 1 STORE_MANAGER user (TEST Store Manager). All API endpoints return correct structure even with empty data.
